findings.title: Expire master failure exits without recording the access result
findings.impact: When ExpireFromMaster returns an error inside the retry loop, the function now returns before the new ObjectAccessRecorder reaches the only Record() call at the end of the function. The previous code explicitly recorded that failure on this path, so failed Expire requests can now lose their access/performance result and only trigger the generic destructor warning.
findings.fix: Record the error before the early return, or wrap the recorder in a local RAII finalizer that always calls Result(last_rc).Record() before any return after the recorder is created.
